sn1.31:1.0.1: Evaṁ me sutaṁ—​ekaṁ samayaṁ bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ vihārati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. Atha kho sambahulā satullapakāyikā devatāyo abhikkantāya rattiyā abhikkantavaṇṇā kevalakappaṁ jetavanaṁ obhāsetvā yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ aṭṭhaṁsu.
sn1.31:1.0.2: "Sabbhireva samāsetha,sabbhi kubbetha santhavaṁ;Sataṁ saddhammamaññāya,seyyo hoti na pāpiyo"ti.
sn1.31:1.0.3: Atha kho aparā devatā bhagavato santike imaṁ gāthaṁ abhāsi:
sn1.31:1.0.4: "Sabbhireva samāsetha,sabbhi kubbetha santhavaṁ;Sataṁ saddhammamaññāya,paññā labbhati nāññato"ti.
sn1.31:1.0.6: "Sabbhireva samāsetha,sabbhi kubbetha santhavaṁ;Sataṁ saddhammamaññāya,sokamajjhe na socatī"ti.
sn1.31:1.0.10: "Sabbhireva samāsetha,sabbhi kubbetha santhavaṁ;Sataṁ saddhammamaññāya,sattā gacchanti suggatin"ti.
sn1.31:1.0.12: "Sabbhireva samāsetha,sabbhi kubbetha santhavaṁ;Sataṁ saddhammamaññāya,sattā tiṭṭhanti sātatan"ti.
sn1.31:1.0.13: Atha kho aparā devatā bhagavantaṁ etadavoca: "kassa nu kho, bhagavā, subhāsitan"ti?
sn1.31:1.0.14: "Sabbāsaṁ vo subhāsitaṁ pariyāyena, api ca mamapi suṇātha –
sn1.31:1.0.15: Sabbhireva samāsetha,sabbhi kubbetha santhavaṁ;Sataṁ saddhammamaññāya,sabbadukkhā pamuccatī"ti.
sn1.31:1.0.16: Idamavoca bhagavā. Attamanā tā devatāyo bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā padakkhiṇaṁ katvā tatthevantaradhāyiṁsūti.
